---
title: "BRA-EUR - Data Validation"
---

## Overview

This doc serves as a high-level data validation check for this iteration of the BRA-EUR report, i.e. xxxx-2025.

The report builds on broadly 2 categories of data and may be complemented by specific data in support of a topic deep dive:    

* network-level
* airport-level
* specific study-data

```{r}
#| out-width: 100%
knitr::include_graphics("./figures/data-source-analytic-perfrelated.png")
```

## Annual Scope


## Network-level

TBD

## Airport-level

```{r}
eur_apts <- c("EGLL","EGKK","EHAM","EDDF","EDDM","LSZH","LFPG","LEMD","LEBL",
              # LIRF - removed to include Lisbon 2024
              "LPPT",
              # 2025 expansion to 12 airports
              "LGAV", "LTFM"
)

bra_apts <- c("SBGR","SBGL","SBRJ","SBCF","SBBR","SBSV","SBKP","SBSP","SBCT","SBPA",
              # 2025 expansion to 12 airports
              "SBRF", "SBEG"
              )
```


### Airport Traffic Count

```{r}
check_apt_tfc_completeness <- function(reg_tfc, apts, series = 2019:2025){
  check_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(ICAO = apts, YEAR = series) |> 
    dplyr::left_join(
      reg_tfc |> dplyr::mutate(YEAR = lubridate::year(DATE)) 
      , by = dplyr::join_by(ICAO, YEAR)
      ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(ICAO, YEAR) |> 
    dplyr::reframe(DAYS = dplyr::n()) |> 
    dplyr::mutate(YEAR_DAYS = paste0(YEAR, "(", DAYS,")")) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(ICAO) |>
    dplyr::reframe(N = n(), COVERAGE = paste(YEAR_DAYS, collapse = ","))

  return(check_grid)
}

check_apt_tfc_viz <- function(reg_tfc){
  tmp <- reg_tfc |> dplyr::mutate(FLTS = ARRS + DEPS) 
  
  p <- tmp|> 
    ggplot2::ggplot() + 
    ggplot2::geom_path(aes(x = DATE, y = FLTS)) + 
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(vars(ICAO)) +
    
    ggplot2::labs(x = NULL)
  
  return(p)
}
```


```{r}
eur_apts_tfc <- fs::dir_ls("./data", regexp = "EUR-apt-tfc") |>
  readr::read_csv(show_col_types = F) |> 
  dplyr::filter(ICAO %in% eur_apts)

eur_apts_tfc |> check_apt_tfc_completeness(eur_apts) |> gt::gt()
```

```{r}
eur_apts_tfc |> check_apt_tfc_viz()
```
